software_development.what is software development: Software development is the process of designing, building, testing and maintaining software systems.
software_development.software lifecycle: The software lifecycle includes planning, development, testing, deployment and maintenance.
software_development.agile vs waterfall: Agile is iterative and flexible, while Waterfall is linear and sequential.
software_development.clean code: Clean code is readable, maintainable and well-structured code following best practices.

programming.python: Python is used for AI, automation, data science and web development.
programming.javascript: JavaScript powers web interactivity and frontend frameworks.
programming.best programming language: The best language depends on use case: Python for AI, JS for web, Rust for performance.
programming.oop: Object Oriented Programming organizes code into classes and objects.
programming.functional programming: Functional programming focuses on pure functions and immutability.

api_development.what is api: API is an interface that allows software systems to communicate.
api_development.rest api: REST APIs use HTTP methods like GET, POST, PUT and DELETE.
api_development.api authentication: Authentication secures APIs using keys, tokens or OAuth.
api_development.rate limiting: Rate limiting controls how many requests a client can make.
api_development.api monetization: APIs can be monetized using subscription or pay-per-use models.

system_design.scalability: Scalability is the ability of a system to handle growth in users or data.
system_design.load balancing: Load balancing distributes traffic across multiple servers.
system_design.microservices: Microservices break applications into independent services.
system_design.monolith vs microservices: Monolith is single unit, microservices are distributed.
system_design.database scaling: Databases scale using sharding, replication and caching.

databases.sql vs nosql: SQL databases are relational, NoSQL are flexible and schema-less.
databases.transactions: Transactions ensure ACID properties in databases.

devops.devops: DevOps combines development and operations for faster delivery.
devops.ci cd: CI/CD automates testing and deployment pipelines.
devops.docker: Docker containers package apps with dependencies.
devops.kubernetes: Kubernetes orchestrates container deployment at scale.

cloud.cloud computing: Cloud computing provides on-demand servers and services.
cloud.aws: AWS is a leading cloud platform by Amazon.
cloud.serverless: Serverless runs code without managing servers.

ai_ml.artificial intelligence: AI enables machines to simulate human intelligence.
ai_ml.machine learning: Machine learning trains models from data.
ai_ml.deep learning: Deep learning uses neural networks with multiple layers.
ai_ml.nlp: NLP enables machines to understand human language.

security.cyber security: Cyber security protects systems from attacks.
security.encryption: Encryption secures data using cryptographic algorithms.
security.zero trust: Zero Trust assumes no user or system is trusted by default.

career.how to become software developer: Learn programming, build projects, study system design and practice problem solving.
career.developer roadmap: Start with programming → web → databases → APIs → system design.
career.how to get job: Build portfolio, contribute to GitHub, practice DSA and apply consistently.
